iron_vow.effect: Power counts one band higher on break-tagged skills; Composure counts one band lower.
iron_vow.summary: Power counts one band higher on break-tagged skills; Composure counts one band lower.

glass_lens.effect: Precision gains extra weakness damage, but Guard starts lower.
glass_lens.summary: Precision gains extra weakness damage, but Guard starts lower.

witness_thread.effect: Entering Flow grants +1 Spotlight once per battle.
witness_thread.summary: Entering Flow grants +1 Spotlight once per battle.

black_salt_charm.effect: Parry counters also apply the wielder's affinity status.
black_salt_charm.summary: Parry counters also apply the wielder's affinity status.

flood_seal.effect: First Tide or Halo skill each battle cleanses one debuff from the user.
flood_seal.summary: First Tide or Halo skill each battle cleanses one debuff from the user.

red_wire_crown.effect: Crit chance rises while below 50% HP, but incoming crit damage also rises.
red_wire_crown.summary: Crit chance rises while below 50% HP, but incoming crit damage also rises.

toll_ledger.effect: Deal extra Break damage to bosses above 50% HP.
toll_ledger.summary: Deal extra Break damage to bosses above 50% HP.

hollow_badge.effect: Entering Bastion restores extra Guard and slightly widens the next parry window.
hollow_badge.summary: Entering Bastion restores extra Guard and slightly widens the next parry window.

green_fuse.effect: Triggering a status combo grants 1 Spotlight. Once per round.
green_fuse.summary: Triggering a status combo grants 1 Spotlight. Once per round.

penitent_nail.effect: Finishers deal extra damage below 50% HP but cost 5% current HP.
penitent_nail.summary: Finishers deal extra damage below 50% HP but cost 5% current HP.
